Struct DVHPoint

Namespace
VMS.TPS.Common.Model.Types
Assembly
VMS.TPS.Common.Model.Types.dll

Represents a value on a Dose Volume Histogram (DVH) curve.

public struct DVHPoint : IXmlSerializable
